payload.answer: The proposed memory is too broad and transcript-like to store as a durable memory card. Please choose how to repair it into concise, durable facts or summaries.
repair_options: Extract only stable personal facts, preferences, commitments, or long-term project details from the transcript and propose them as separate candidate memory options.
Create a short high-level summary of the conversation as a candidate, excluding verbatim transcript text and non-durable details.
Do not save anything from this transcript.
Ask the user which specific parts of the transcript, if any, should be remembered.
If the transcript contains multiple unrelated facts, offer to keep them as separate candidate memories rather than merging them into one large card.
